name: alchemy-lab
summary: A working alchemist's laboratory. Central bench with active apparatus, ingredient shelves, specimen jars. Volatile, disorderly in a practiced way.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: L-shape ideal — main bench space + storage alcove

accent.purpose: stained reagent zone around primary bench

primary_palette.note: alcohol/poison distillery setup as the room's purpose
biological specimen focus — necromancer or vivisectionist

story_prompts: mid-experiment — apparatus active, alchemist stepped out for a moment
catastrophic failure — overturned bench, glass everywhere, strange stain spreading
organized mastermind — everything labeled, inventory current, eerie in its precision
novice's first lab — cheap gear, trial-and-error burn marks, overambitious notes
anti_patterns: include at least one hazard cell near the bench — alchemy is messy
ingredient storage separate from active bench area — fire-safety logic
don't arrange bottles in a grid — working shelves are layered and stacked
